calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Or, In The Alternative, To Compel Defendant Shabelskys Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set No. One, To Shabelsky, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF EUGENE FURSOV'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Or, In The Alternative, To Compel Defendant Shabelskys Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set No. One, To Shabelsky is granted. Defendant Shabelsky shall serve the original verification by May 27, 2015. The general objections are stricken. Sanctions are denied. The moving Party is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
